concept: True / Genuine / In Accordance with Reality
description: In accordance with fact or reality; genuine and authentic. 'Shewo' names the quality of truth—not merely factual accuracy but the deeper genuineness of being what one appears to be.
sound_symbolism: The word speaks truth. 'She' /ʃe/ begins with soft certainty, honesty present. Then 'wo' rounds into wholeness, truth complete.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'shewo lira' (true words). Related to 'noemi' (authentic) but emphasizes correspondence with reality rather than faithfulness to self.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Truth (sacca) is foundational—right speech begins with speaking what is true.
pillars.peace-linguistics-practices: True communication requires both factual accuracy and authentic intention—truth in content and manner.
